theorem: Plane maps with a term c x^i y^j (i>=2) in f alone are never Keller. Symbolically f=x+P(y)x^N (N>=2) is Keller iff P=0. N=1 normal form with y-degree <=4 solves to E_y only (0 elem branches, 0 non-elem). E_x is the dual family f=x, g=y+Q(x).
gap_to_full_jc: Need: every plane Keller map is affinely equivalent to one with deg_x(f)=1 and either deg_x(g)=0 (E_y path) or f=x and g=y+Q(x) (E_x), or deg-2 shear. Pure-power leading + GL2 gives axis form; x-degree reduction kills deg_x(f)>=2.
